title: Navodaya Vidyalaya Student Portal App

requirements.text: Create a backend actor with data models and storage for Navodaya Vidyalaya school information, including: student profiles (name, class, house, roll number), announcements/notices, and exam schedules.
acceptanceCriteria: Backend stores and retrieves student profile records
Backend stores and retrieves school announcements/notices
Backend stores and retrieves exam schedule entries
CRUD operations are available for each data type

requirements.text: Build a frontend dashboard with sections for: Home (school overview and latest announcements), Students (profile listing and details), Notices Board (school announcements), and Exam Schedule (timetable view).
acceptanceCriteria: Navigation allows switching between Home, Students, Notices, and Exam Schedule sections
Home page shows a welcome banner and latest announcements
Students section lists student profiles with basic details
Notices board displays school announcements in chronological order
Exam schedule shows a timetable of upcoming exams

requirements.text: Apply a cohesive visual theme inspired by Navodaya Vidyalaya's identity: use deep maroon and golden-yellow as primary colors, clean academic typography, structured card-based layouts with subtle borders, and a professional institutional look. Enforce this theme consistently across all pages and components.
acceptanceCriteria: Primary color palette uses deep maroon and golden-yellow tones
Typography is clean and readable, suitable for an academic institution
All pages use a consistent layout structure with card-based content areas
The visual style feels professional and institutional throughout the app

requirements.text: Generate and display a school portal hero banner image and a Navodaya logo/emblem illustration as static assets in the app header and home page.
acceptanceCriteria: Hero banner image is displayed on the home page
Logo/emblem is displayed in the app header

constraints: All backend logic must remain in a single Motoko actor file (backend/main.mo)
Do not edit any files listed under frontend.immutablePaths
Use only React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and React Query on the frontend
nonGoals: External authentication (only Internet Identity if auth is needed)
Integration with any external school management APIs

required: Wide landscape banner illustration of a school campus with lush greenery, a flagpole, and a grand academic building in warm maroon and golden tones (navodaya-hero-banner.dim_1200x400.png)
Circular emblem/badge illustration featuring a book, a torch of knowledge, and decorative border in deep maroon and golden-yellow colors (navodaya-emblem.dim_128x128.png)
